channel.title: Learning on Alicheh
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on Alicheh

item.title: The First Seed: Why I'm Starting This Digital Garden
item.description:
In the name of God

Welcome to my little garden! My corner of the web.

For a long time, I’ve wanted a space to document and share my journey—not just the finished products, but the messy, exciting process of learning and building.

What to expect here:

This space is designed as a Digital Garden—a living collection of notes, essays, and experiments that will grow and evolve over time. Here is what I plan (and not plan!) to share:
